creator: piotrekk@excite.com
text:
after ports tree update, I've installed wireshark from ports under freeBSD 5.4 without any errors, but the wireshark won't start:

bsd# wireshark
wireshark: Command not found.

bsd# whereis wireshark
wireshark: /usr/ports/net/wireshark

bsd# locate wireshark
